back_translation: The revelation of Jesus Christ, which God has given to Him, in order to reveal to His servants concerning what must happen soon. And He has shown by sending His angel to John His servant
Who has been a witness about the word of God, and the testimony of Jesus Christ, namely everything that he has seen
Blessing be to the one who reads aloud, and to those who hear the words of this prophecy and keep what has been written in it, because the time is drawing near

John, to the seven churches that are in the province of Asia. May grace and peace be to you all, from Him who exists, who has existed, and who will come, and from the seven Spirits that are before His throne
And from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness, who is the firstborn from the dead, and who is the ruler of the kings of the earth. To Him who loves us, and has released us from our sins by His blood
And has made us to be a kingdom and priests for His God and Father. May glory and dominion be to Him forever and ever. Amen
Behold, He will come with the clouds, and every eye will see Him, even those who pierced Him. And every tribe of the earth will mourn because of Him. Yes indeed. Amen
‘I am the Alpha and the Omega,’ says the Lord God, who exists, who has existed, and who will come, the One of great mighty-power
I, John, your brother and partner in the suffering, kingdom, and perseverance, that are in Jesus, was on the island called Patmos, because of the word of God and the testimony about Jesus
On the day of the Lord, I was in the Spirit, and heard a loud voice like a trumpet behind me

That voice said, ‘Write what you see in a book, and send it to the seven churches, namely the city of Ephesus, the city of Smyrna, the city of Pergamum, the city of Thyatira, the city of Sardis, the city of Philadelphia, and the city of Laodicea’
And I turned to see the voice that was speaking with me. When I had turned, I saw seven golden lampstands
And in the midst of those lampstands, there was one like the Son of Man, dressed in a long robe reaching to the feet, and wearing a golden chest-belt across the chest
His head and His hair were white like white wool, white like snow. And His eyes were like a flame of fire
And His feet were like polished bronze, like that which is heated in a furnace. And His voice was like the sound of many waters
He held seven stars in His right hand. And a sharp double-edged sword was coming out from His mouth. And His face was like the sun shining in its strength
When I saw Him, I fell at His feet like a dead person. But He placed His right hand upon me, and said, ‘Do not be afraid. I am the First and the Last
And the Living One. I have died, and behold, I am alive forever and ever. And I hold the keys of Death and Hades
Therefore, write what you have seen, what is at this time, and what will happen after this

The mystery of the seven stars that you saw in My right hand, and the seven golden lampstands, is that the seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands are the seven churches’
